verses.text: Hih laibu pen a piang baih ding thute, Pasian' nasemte tungah a lah dingin Pasian in Jesuh tungah a thu pia a, Jesuh in maang sungah a lah thute ahi hi. Khrih in ama vantung mi sawl a, a nasempa Johan kiangah hih thute a kilangsak hi
Johan in zong a muhsa thu khempeuh na gen leuleu hi. Hih thute pen Johan in Pasian kiang panin hong pai thute leh Jesuh Khrih in ama tungah a lahkhiat thuman thutakte a genna thu ahi hi
Hih laibu a sim mite mi hampha hi a, hih thu kigente ngai-in, hih laibu sungah a kigelh thu a zuite zong mi hampha mah ahi uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih thu kigente a tun'ding hun hong naita hi.

Johan in Asia gamsungah a om pawlpi sagihte tungah a khak lai ahi hi. * A beisa hun, tuhun, leh mailam hunah a om tawntung Pasian kiang pan leh ama tokhom mai-ah a om Kha Siangtho sagihte tung pan leh

thuman takin teci a pang, sihna panin a kithosak kik Tapa upa, leitung kumpite tungah ukna aana a nei Jesuh Khrih kiang panin note tungah hehpihna leh nopsakna thupha hong tung ta hen. * Tua Jesuh Khrih in eite hong it a, ama sihna tawh i mawhna panin eite hong suaktasak a
ama Pa Pasian' na a sem dingin siampi leh kumpi za-ah a hong koih hi. Tua Jesuh in minthan'na leh vangliatna nei tawntung ta hen. Amen

En un, amah hong paita ding a, meiipi tawh hong tonkhawm ding hi. Teipi tawh amah a sunte-a kipan mi khempeuh in a mu ding uh hi. Amah a hong pai ciangin leitung mi khempeuh lau-in a kap ding uh hi. Hih ka gen bangin hong piang takpi ding hi. Amen
A beisa hun, tuhun, leh mailam hunah zong a om tawntung ding a Vanglian Topa Pasian in, “Kei pen na khempeuh a Kipatna leh a Tawpna ka hi hi,” a ci hi.

Note' sanggam keimah Johan in Jesuh tawh kipawlna hangin note mah bangin bawlsiatna thuakin, Pasian' Ukna sungah omin, lungduai takin a thuak mipa ka hi hi. Pasian' thu leh Jesuh' hong gen thumante ka genna hangin Patmos a kici tuikulhah kei hong kikoih hi
Topa' ni-in Kha Siangtho tawh kidimin ka om laitakin peengkul bangin a gingpha mahmah khat ka nunglamah ka za a

“Na muhte khempeuh laibu sungah gelh in la, Efesa pawlpi, Smyrna pawlpi, Pergamum pawlpi, Thiatira pawlpi, Sardis pawlpi, Filadelfia pawlpi, Laodisia pawlpi, hih pawlpi sagihte kiangah khak in,” hong ci hi
Kua in kei hong hopih ahi hiam, ci-in a en dingin ka kihei leh kham kibawl meivakna sagih ka mu hi
Tua meivakte lakah, puantualpi khat silhin a awm-ah kham kibawl awmgak a gak, mi tawh a kibang khat ka mu hi
A samte tuumul bangin kangin, khuavak bangin pak a, a mittangte meikuang a bang hi
A khete, pumbukah a kihalsan sumngo bang a, a awging ahih leh tuipi ging a bang hi
A taklam khutah aksi sagih tawi-in, a kam sung panin langnih a hiam namsau khat hong pusuak a, a maitang sun nitaang a bang hi
Amah ka muh ciangin misi bangin ama khe phungah ka puk hi. Ahi zongin amah in ka tungah a taklam khut hong nga a, “Lau kei in; kei pen a kipatna leh a tawpna ka hi a
a nungta mipa zong ka hi hi. Kei ka si ngei hi. Ahi zongin tu-in hong en in, a nungta tawntung ka hi hi. Sihna leh misite omna gam keima khutnuai ahi uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin tu-a na muh, tu laitakin a om thute leh tu nung ciangin a hong piangding thute, lai sungah gelh in

Tu-in ka taklam khutsungah na muh aksi sagihte leh kham kibawl meivakna sagihte a khiatna in: Aksi sagihte pen pawlpi sagihte' vantung mite a cihna hi a, meivakna sagihte pen pawlpi sagihte a cihna ahi hi.
